name: Doll Show Shrimp and Eggs
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup chopped leeks, white part only
1/3 cup chopped fresh tomatoes, seeds & pulp
salt and freshly ground black pepper
3 ounces cream cheese, cut into 1/4" cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Bring a pint of water to boil and add the Old Bay Seasoning and shrimp. Cook until they are just pink; do not overcook.
3. Drain and peel the shrimp, then cut each one in half.
4. Melt butter in an ovenproof skillet, then add leeks and tomatoes. Saute gently for about 5 minutes until leeks are softened.
5. Pour eggs into the leek-tomato mixture; season with salt and pepper. Cook over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally to prevent browning, until eggs almost congealed but still have some liquid.
6. Stir in shrimp and cream cheese. Bake for about 10 minutes or until cream cheese is melted and eggs are completely congealed.
7. Serves 2-3.
